text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  - APACHE_COMPAT is deprecated
  - Consolidate (BUILD|RUN)_DEPENDS
  - Kill DEPENDS_ARGS not needed anymore
  - Use SUB_FILES for pkg-message
  - pkg-plist fix
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/133690
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout (30 days)
  Submitted by:   me
